description:
!MLA!

“The only thing you wanna do is…”

-Past NSFW mentioned, Angst(?)-

Inspired by All You Wanna Do from SIX sung by Aimie Atkinson. I love this musical so much akjwdbk. Pt. 2 of me stalling for bot 6 of the series :)). Unsurprisingly, I was half zoned out while writing this so I apologize if the writing sounds kinda funky. I actually love this man so much be kind to him :(( As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

⚠️WARNING: Mentions of past Pedophilia, Grooming, and SA in the background. Non-con(?), Dub-con(?) in the intro. He doesn't like it but he technically consents to it to keep his job⚠️

ART IS **NOT** MINE- was posted on Pinterest by ♡Ayumix♡ :))
